query: 查询所有客户信息
expected_sql: SELECT * FROM Customers LIMIT 50;

query: 查询来自德国的客户
expected_sql: SELECT CustomerID, CompanyName, ContactName, City FROM Customers WHERE Country = 'Germany';

query: 查询单价超过50的产品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice FROM Products WHERE UnitPrice > 50 ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC;

query: 查询所有已停产的产品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice FROM Products WHERE Discontinued = '1';

query: 查询运费超过200的订单
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate, Freight, ShipCountry FROM Orders WHERE Freight > 200 ORDER BY Freight DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询职位为Sales Manager的员工
expected_sql: SELECT EmployeeID, FirstName, LastName, Title, City FROM Employees WHERE Title = 'Sales Manager';

query: 查询产品名称中包含Chai的商品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice, UnitsInStock FROM Products WHERE ProductName LIKE '%Chai%';

query: 查询库存量超过50件的产品并按库存量降序排列
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitsInStock, UnitPrice FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock > 50 ORDER BY UnitsInStock DESC;

query: 查询发往美国的前20条订单
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate, ShipCity FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'USA' ORDER BY OrderDate DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询来自法国或德国的供应商
expected_sql: SELECT SupplierID, CompanyName, Country, City, Phone FROM Suppliers WHERE Country IN ('France', 'Germany');

query: 查询每个订单对应的客户公司名称和订单日期
expected_sql: SELECT o.OrderID, c.CompanyName, o.OrderDate FROM Orders o JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID ORDER BY o.OrderDate DESC LIMIT 50;

query: 查询订单明细中每个产品的名称、单价和订购数量
expected_sql: SELECT od.OrderID, p.ProductName, od.UnitPrice, od.Quantity FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID LIMIT 50;

query: 查询每位员工处理过的订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY order_count DESC;

query: 查询每个产品类别下的产品名称和单价
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, p.ProductName, p.UnitPrice FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID ORDER BY c.CategoryName, p.UnitPrice DESC;

query: 查询来自美国的客户的订单及每笔订单金额
expected_sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, o.OrderID, o.OrderDate, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS order_amount FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE c.Country = 'USA' GROUP BY o.OrderID ORDER BY order_amount DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询每个供应商提供的产品数量
expected_sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS product_count FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.SupplierID ORDER BY product_count DESC;

query: 查询向Andrew Fuller汇报的员工列表
expected_sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, e.Title FROM Employees e JOIN Employees m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeID WHERE m.FirstName = 'Andrew' AND m.LastName = 'Fuller';

query: 查询包含海鲜类产品的订单编号和客户名称
expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.OrderID, c.CompanyName FROM Orders o JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories cat ON p.CategoryID = cat.CategoryID WHERE cat.CategoryName = 'Seafood' LIMIT 20;

query: 查询每个运货商承运的订单数量和平均运费
expected_sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count, ROUND(AVG(o.Freight), 2) AS avg_freight FROM Shippers s JOIN Orders o ON s.ShipperID = o.ShipVia GROUP BY s.ShipperID ORDER BY order_count DESC;

query: 查询订单明细中折扣金额最高的前10条记录
expected_sql: SELECT od.OrderID, p.ProductName, od.UnitPrice, od.Quantity, od.Discount, ROUND(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * od.Discount, 2) AS discount_amount FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE od.Discount > 0 ORDER BY discount_amount DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询每个区域下辖的领地数量
expected_sql: SELECT r.RegionDescription, COUNT(t.TerritoryID) AS territory_count FROM Regions r JOIN Territories t ON r.RegionID = t.RegionID GROUP BY r.RegionID ORDER BY territory_count DESC;

query: 查询没有下过任何订单的客户
expected_sql: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.CompanyName, c.Country FROM Customers c LEFT JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID WHERE o.OrderID IS NULL;

query: 查询每位员工服务过的不重复客户数量
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.CustomerID) AS customer_count FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

query: 查询每个类别中单价最高的产品名称
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, p.ProductName, p.UnitPrice FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID WHERE p.UnitPrice = (SELECT MAX(p2.UnitPrice) FROM Products p2 WHERE p2.CategoryID = p.CategoryID) ORDER BY p.UnitPrice DESC;

query: 查询每位员工的上级主管姓名
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, e.Title, COALESCE(m.FirstName || ' ' || m.LastName, '无上级') AS manager_name FROM Employees e LEFT JOIN Employees m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeID;

query: 统计每个国家的客户数量并按数量降序排列
expected_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(CustomerID) AS customer_count FROM Customers GROUP BY Country ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

query: 计算所有产品的平均单价
expected_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(UnitPrice), 2) AS avg_price FROM Products;

query: 统计每个产品类别的产品数量
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS product_count FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryID ORDER BY product_count DESC;

query: 计算每位员工的总销售金额
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_sales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

query: 统计每个目的国的总运费和平均运费
expected_sql: SELECT ShipCountry, ROUND(SUM(Freight), 2) AS total_freight, ROUND(AVG(Freight), 2) AS avg_freight FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipCountry ORDER BY total_freight DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 计算消费总额最高的前20名客户
expected_sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_spent FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 统计每种产品的总订购次数和总订购数量
expected_sql: SELECT p.ProductName, COUNT(od.OrderID) AS order_times, SUM(od.Quantity) AS total_quantity FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 计算每个供应商所提供产品的平均单价
expected_sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, ROUND(AVG(p.UnitPrice), 2) AS avg_price FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.SupplierID ORDER BY avg_price DESC;

query: 统计每个产品类别的最高价格和最低价格
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, MAX(p.UnitPrice) AS max_price, MIN(p.UnitPrice) AS min_price FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryID ORDER BY max_price DESC;

query: 统计每个运货商处理的订单数量和总运费
expected_sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count, ROUND(SUM(o.Freight), 2) AS total_freight FROM Shippers s JOIN Orders o ON s.ShipperID = o.ShipVia GROUP BY s.ShipperID ORDER BY order_count DESC;

query: 计算每个客户的平均订单金额前10名
expected_sql: WITH order_amounts AS (SELECT o.CustomerID, o.OrderID, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS order_amount FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID) SELECT c.CompanyName, ROUND(AVG(oa.order_amount), 2) AS avg_order_amount FROM Customers c JOIN order_amounts oa ON c.CustomerID = oa.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY avg_order_amount DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 统计折扣总额超过1000的订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS qualified_orders FROM (SELECT OrderID, SUM(UnitPrice * Quantity * Discount) AS discount_total FROM "Order Details" GROUP BY OrderID HAVING discount_total > 1000);

query: 计算库存总价值最高的前5个产品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductName, UnitPrice, UnitsInStock, ROUND(UnitPrice * UnitsInStock, 2) AS inventory_value FROM Products ORDER BY inventory_value DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 统计每位员工每年处理的订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) AS year, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, year ORDER BY employee_name, year LIMIT 50;

query: 计算全部订单折扣后的总销售额
expected_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM "Order Details";

query: 查询2014年的所有订单（前50条）
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, EmployeeID, OrderDate, Freight FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2014' LIMIT 50;

query: 查询2015年第三季度的订单
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate, ShipCountry FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2015' AND strftime('%m', OrderDate) BETWEEN '07' AND '09' ORDER BY OrderDate;

query: 统计每年的订单数量和总运费变化趋势
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', OrderDate) AS year, COUNT(OrderID) AS order_count, ROUND(SUM(Freight), 2) AS total_freight FROM Orders GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

query: 统计2014年每月的总销售额
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS month, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS monthly_revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) = '2014' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

query: 计算所有订单从下单到发货的平均天数
expected_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(julianday(ShippedDate) - julianday(OrderDate)), 2) AS avg_shipping_days FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL;

query: 查询超过预期收货日期才发货的前20条订单
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate, RequiredDate, ShippedDate, ROUND(julianday(ShippedDate) - julianday(RequiredDate), 0) AS days_late FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate > RequiredDate ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询2013年和2014年都有购买记录的客户数量
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS returning_customers FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2014' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2013');

query: 统计2014年上半年每月的订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS month, COUNT(OrderID) AS order_count FROM Orders WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2014' AND strftime('%m', OrderDate) <= '06' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

query: 查询2021年到2023年每年的总销售额
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) AS year, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) BETWEEN '2021' AND '2023' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

query: 查询历史上订单量最多的前5个月份
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS month, COUNT(OrderID) AS order_count FROM Orders GROUP BY month ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询每位员工的销售额及其在全员中的排名
expected_sql: WITH emp_sales AS (SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_sales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID) SELECT employee_name, total_sales, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank FROM emp_sales;

query: 查询每个类别内各产品按单价的排名
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, p.ProductName, p.UnitPrice, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.CategoryID ORDER BY p.UnitPrice DESC) AS price_rank FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID ORDER BY c.CategoryName, price_rank;

query: 统计每个客户的订单数量及在所有客户中的排名
expected_sql: WITH order_counts AS (SELECT c.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID) SELECT CompanyName, order_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY order_count DESC) AS rank FROM order_counts ORDER BY rank LIMIT 20;

query: 计算每位员工的订单数与全员平均订单数的差值
expected_sql: WITH emp_counts AS (SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID) SELECT employee_name, order_count, ROUND(order_count - AVG(order_count) OVER (), 2) AS diff_from_avg FROM emp_counts ORDER BY diff_from_avg DESC;

query: 按月统计销售额及与上月相比的增减金额（前24个月）
expected_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS month, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS monthly_revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY month) SELECT month, monthly_revenue, ROUND(monthly_revenue - LAG(monthly_revenue, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS mom_change FROM monthly ORDER BY month LIMIT 24;

query: 查询每位员工按时间排序的累计销售额
expected_sql: WITH order_sales AS (SELECT o.EmployeeID, o.OrderDate, o.OrderID, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS order_amount FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID) SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, os.OrderDate, os.order_amount, ROUND(SUM(os.order_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY os.EmployeeID ORDER BY os.OrderDate), 2) AS cumulative_sales FROM Employees e JOIN order_sales os ON e.EmployeeID = os.EmployeeID ORDER BY employee_name, os.OrderDate LIMIT 50;

query: 查询每个国家的总销售额及全球排名
expected_sql: WITH country_sales AS (SELECT c.Country, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_sales FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.Country) SELECT Country, total_sales, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS global_rank FROM country_sales ORDER BY global_rank;

query: 计算每个产品的订单量占同类别订单量的百分比
expected_sql: WITH prod_orders AS (SELECT p.ProductID, p.ProductName, p.CategoryID, COUNT(od.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID) SELECT po.ProductName, c.CategoryName, po.order_count, ROUND(po.order_count * 100.0 / SUM(po.order_count) OVER (PARTITION BY po.CategoryID), 2) AS pct_of_category FROM prod_orders po JOIN Categories c ON po.CategoryID = c.CategoryID ORDER BY c.CategoryName, pct_of_category DESC LIMIT 30;

query: 查询每位员工最近处理的3个订单
expected_sql: SELECT employee_name, OrderID, OrderDate FROM (SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, o.OrderID, o.OrderDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY o.OrderDate DESC) AS rn FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID) WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY employee_name, OrderDate DESC;

query: 查询2013年和2014年按季度统计的销售额及同比变化
expected_sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) AS year, CASE WHEN strftime('%m', o.OrderDate) <= '03' THEN 'Q1' WHEN strftime('%m', o.OrderDate) <= '06' THEN 'Q2' WHEN strftime('%m', o.OrderDate) <= '09' THEN 'Q3' ELSE 'Q4' END AS quarter, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) IN ('2013', '2014') GROUP BY year, quarter) SELECT year, quarter, revenue, ROUND(revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY quarter ORDER BY year), 2) AS yoy_change FROM quarterly ORDER BY year, quarter;

query: 查询消费金额超过所有客户平均消费水平的客户
expected_sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_spent FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID HAVING total_spent > (SELECT AVG(t) FROM (SELECT SUM(od2.UnitPrice * od2.Quantity * (1 - od2.Discount)) AS t FROM Orders o2 JOIN "Order Details" od2 ON o2.OrderID = od2.OrderID GROUP BY o2.CustomerID)) ORDER BY total_spent DESC;

query: 查询从未被任何订单订购过的产品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice FROM Products WHERE ProductID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProductID FROM "Order Details");

query: 查询销售额最高的前3个产品类别
expected_sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS total_sales FROM Categories c JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY c.CategoryID ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 3;

query: 查询订单数量高于全员平均水平的员工
expected_sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS order_count FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID HAVING order_count > (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS cnt FROM Orders GROUP BY EmployeeID));

query: 查询购买产品种类最多的前5个客户
expected_sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, COUNT(DISTINCT od.ProductID) AS distinct_products FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY distinct_products DESC LIMIT 5;

query: 查询每个供应商中单价高于该供应商平均价格的产品
expected_sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, p.ProductName, p.UnitPrice, ROUND(sub.avg_price, 2) AS supplier_avg FROM Products p JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID JOIN (SELECT SupplierID, AVG(UnitPrice) AS avg_price FROM Products GROUP BY SupplierID) sub ON p.SupplierID = sub.SupplierID WHERE p.UnitPrice > sub.avg_price ORDER BY s.CompanyName;

query: 查询在所有订单中从未享受过折扣的产品
expected_sql: SELECT p.ProductName FROM Products p WHERE p.ProductID IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProductID FROM "Order Details") AND p.ProductID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProductID FROM "Order Details" WHERE Discount > 0);

query: 使用CTE统计每位员工的销售额及占总销售额的比例
expected_sql: WITH emp_sales AS (SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS employee_name, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS total_sales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID), grand_total AS (SELECT SUM(total_sales) AS gt FROM emp_sales) SELECT es.employee_name, ROUND(es.total_sales, 2) AS total_sales, ROUND(es.total_sales * 100.0 / gt.gt, 2) AS pct FROM emp_sales es CROSS JOIN grand_total gt ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

query: 查询每个客户的最近购买时间、总订单数和购买产品种类数
expected_sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, MAX(o.OrderDate) AS last_purchase_date, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS total_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT od.ProductID) AS distinct_products FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY last_purchase_date DESC LIMIT 15;

query: 查询1997年销售额最高和最低的月份
expected_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS month, ROUND(SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)), 2) AS revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', o.OrderDate) = '1997' GROUP BY month) SELECT month, revenue, 'highest' AS label FROM monthly WHERE revenue = (SELECT MAX(revenue) FROM monthly) UNION ALL SELECT month, revenue, 'lowest' AS label FROM monthly WHERE revenue = (SELECT MIN(revenue) FROM monthly);

query: 查询DWS日汇总表中订单量最多的前10天
expected_sql: SELECT order_date, order_count, ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue FROM dws_orders_daily ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 10;

query: 查询DWS国家汇总表中销售额排名前5的国家
expected_sql: SELECT Country, ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(avg_order_value, 2) AS avg_order_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM dws_country_summary ORDER BY revenue_rank LIMIT 5;

query: 从员工绩效汇总表查询销售额最高的3名员工
expected_sql: SELECT employee_name, Title, total_orders, ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(avg_order_value, 2) AS avg_order_value FROM dws_employee_performance ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 3;

query: 统计DWS日汇总表中2020年每月的平均日订单量
expected_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, ROUND(AVG(order_count), 2) AS avg_daily_orders, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue), 2) AS monthly_revenue FROM dws_orders_daily WHERE strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2020' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

query: 对比DWS员工绩效表与订单表中各员工的总订单数
expected_sql: SELECT d.employee_name, d.total_orders AS dws_total_orders, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS actual_total_orders FROM dws_employee_performance d JOIN Employees e ON d.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY d.EmployeeID ORDER BY actual_total_orders DESC;

query: 查询库存数量为零的产品
expected_sql: SELECT ProductID, ProductName, UnitPrice, UnitsOnOrder FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock = 0;

query: 查询尚未发货的订单
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, EmployeeID, OrderDate, RequiredDate FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NULL ORDER BY OrderDate DESC LIMIT 20;

query: 查询折扣为25%的订单明细
expected_sql: SELECT od.OrderID, p.ProductName, od.UnitPrice, od.Quantity, od.Discount FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE od.Discount = 0.25 LIMIT 20;

query: 查询同一订单中同一产品出现多次的重复记录
expected_sql: SELECT OrderID, ProductID, COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count FROM "Order Details" GROUP BY OrderID, ProductID HAVING duplicate_count > 1;

query: 查询单条订单明细中订购数量超过100件的记录
expected_sql: SELECT od.OrderID, p.ProductName, od.Quantity, od.UnitPrice, ROUND(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity, 2) AS line_total FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE od.Quantity > 100 ORDER BY od.Quantity DESC LIMIT 20;
